uiBuilder.label: Metrics Nav
uiBuilder.description: Config-driven navigation bar for the Metrics Portal. Binds to the active Dashboard records (ordered by nav_order, optionally grouped by nav_group), highlights the current dashboard, and emits a Navigate event when an item is clicked. Adding a Dashboard record automatically adds a nav entry — no UI Builder authoring.

properties.name: dashboards
properties.label: Data · Dashboards
properties.description: Hierarchical array of active dashboards. Each top-level item is a nav bar entry: { key, title (or name), nav_group, nav_order, icon, active, children }. An item's optional `children` array (sub-dashboards) is shown in a popup when its parent is hovered. Bind to the /nav Data Resource (active dashboards, order by nav_order). Leave empty to show built-in sample items.

properties.name: currentKey
properties.label: Data · Current key
properties.description: The key of the dashboard currently being viewed. Bind to the generic page's route param so the matching nav item is highlighted.

properties.name: orientation
properties.label: Layout · Orientation
properties.description: Horizontal = a top nav bar. Vertical = a stacked sidebar.

properties.name: groupByCategory
properties.label: Layout · Group by nav group
properties.description: Group nav items by their nav_group value. Off = one flat list ordered by nav_order.

properties.name: showGroupLabels
properties.label: Layout · Show group labels
properties.description: When grouping is on, show the nav_group name as a heading above each group.

properties.name: showIcons
properties.label: Layout · Show icons
properties.description: Show a small marker for items that have an icon set. (Decorative dot; swap for your icon system if desired.)

properties.name: itemAlignment
properties.label: Layout · Item alignment
properties.description: Horizontal placement of the nav items. Center aligns them in the middle of the bar (sidebar: cross-axis). The logo always stays pinned to the far-left/top.

properties.name: showLogo
properties.label: Logo · Show logo
properties.description: Show the brand logo at the far-left (top, in vertical layout). Turn off for experiences that supply their own header.

properties.name: logoText
properties.label: Logo · Text
properties.description: Wordmark shown as the logo. Defaults to "Metrics Portal"; override per experience. Leave blank (and set no image) to hide the logo.

properties.name: logoImageUrl
properties.label: Logo · Image URL
properties.description: Optional logo image (e.g. an instance attachment or db_image URL). Rendered before the text; leave blank for a text-only wordmark.

properties.name: logoImageAlt
properties.label: Logo · Image alt text
properties.description: Accessible alt text for the logo image. Falls back to the logo text when blank.

properties.name: logoImageHeight
properties.label: Logo · Image height
properties.description: Rendered height of the logo image. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: brandLabel
properties.label: Layout · Brand label
properties.description: Optional title/brand text rendered before the nav items. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: emptyMessage
properties.label: Layout · Empty message
properties.description: Text shown when there are no active dashboards to display.

properties.name: ariaLabel
properties.label: Accessibility · Aria label
properties.description: Accessible label for the nav landmark, announced by screen readers.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.label: Style · Background color
properties.description: Nav background. CSS color or "transparent".

properties.name: textColor
properties.label: Style · Text color
properties.description: Color of inactive nav item text.

properties.name: activeBackgroundColor
properties.label: Style · Active background
properties.description: Background color of the currently-selected nav item.

properties.name: activeTextColor
properties.label: Style · Active text color
properties.description: Text color of the currently-selected nav item.

properties.name: popupBackgroundColor
properties.label: Style · Popup background
properties.description: Background color of the children popup shown when hovering a parent nav item.

properties.name: itemGap
properties.label: Style · Item gap
properties.description: Gap between nav items. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: itemRadius
properties.label: Style · Item corner radius
properties.description: Rounded corners of each nav item. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: itemPadding
properties.label: Style · Item padding
properties.description: Padding inside each nav item, e.g. "8px 12px".

properties.name: fontSize
properties.label: Style · Font size
properties.description: Font size of nav item text. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.label: Style · Font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for the nav. Blank = inherit from the page.

actions.name: NAVIGATE
actions.label: Navigate
actions.description: Fired when a nav item is clicked. Wire this to route the generic dashboard page to the selected key.

payload.name: key
payload.label: Dashboard key
payload.description: The URL slug/key of the clicked dashboard.

payload.name: title
payload.label: Dashboard title
payload.description: The display title of the clicked dashboard.

payload.name: navGroup
payload.label: Nav group
payload.description: The nav_group of the clicked dashboard (may be blank).
